title: Procedural Music Format (PMF) 0.1
description: Schema for PMF 0.1 composition files. An open format for procedural and AI-assisted music composition data.

engine_version.description: Semver of the engine that wrote this file.

summary.description: Engine-generated natural language description of the composition. Under 80 words.

identity.description: Who this composition is and what it sounds like.

seed.description: The seed that produced this composition.

key.description: Key name in standard notation (e.g. 'A minor', 'F# minor', 'C major').

key_type.description: Scale type: natural_minor, harmonic_minor, major, pentatonic, etc.

key_shift_semitones.description: Semitone offset from the engine's reference key.

bars.description: Number of bars in the loop.

render_key.description: Exact rendering context. Required for byte-identical reconstruction.

bars.description: Bar count used for this render. Must match identity.bars.

loop_mode.description: Whether the composition was rendered as a seamless loop.

engine_version_major.description: Major semver component of the engine. Determinism is stable within a major version.

palette_pack_version.description: Version of the palette pack used, if the engine supports swappable packs.

progression_label.description: Human description of the progression character.

key_root_midi.description: MIDI note number of the key root (A4=69).

bass_pattern.description: Per-beat interval offsets from chord root in semitones.

bass_pattern_label.description: Human description of the bass movement (e.g. 'root-root-fifth-root').

arp_pattern_label.description: Human description of the arp movement.

arp_bar_order.description: Which arp pattern index plays each bar.

melody.description: Named melodic motifs. Keys are motif identifiers (motif_a, motif_b, theme, etc.).

abc.description: Motif body in ABC notation. No headers — key context comes from identity.key.

intervals_semitones.description: Interval steps in semitones. Allows LLM reasoning without ABC parsing.

rhythm.description: Human-readable rhythm description (e.g. 'half quarter quarter whole').

label.description: Human description of the motif's musical character.

active_bars.description: Bar indices where this motif plays.

arrangement.description: How the composition unfolds bar by bar.

sections.description: Named sections with bar ranges and active stems.

stems_active.description: Which stems are active in this section.

bar_gains.description: Per-stem gain arrays. One float per bar. 0.0=silent, 1.0=full, >1.0=boosted.

voices.description: Per-voice synthesis parameters. Engine-defined. Keys are voice names.

fx.description: Post-processing chain. Engine-defined. Common keys: reverb, delay, sidechain, limiter.

mix.description: Master mix parameters. Engine-defined. Stem volumes, reactive tiers, tween timing.

extensions.description: Engine-specific extensions. Each key should match the engine name to avoid collisions.
